backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the IPGT backend, implementing user profile management, IP record registration, and IP database CRUD operations with role-based access control via AccessControl and MixinAuthorization mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (IP Database page, search/filter, add/edit/delete IP records, user profiles, IP registration) to their source files, components, and test IDs with confidence ratings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON summary document describing the purpose and key details of each frontend source file in the project.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom property tokens for light and dark themes using OKLCH color values for backgrounds, foregrounds, borders, and chart colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the React SPA with the IPGT page title, favicon pointing to the generated logo asset, and a root div for mounting the app.
frontend/src/App.tsx: TanStack Router setup defining routes for Home, Register IP, IP Database, and Whitepaper pages under a shared Layout root route.
frontend/src/components/AddIPRecordModal: Modal form component for adding a new IP database record with IPv4/IPv6 validation, all required fields, and submission via the useAddIPRecord mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/AnimatedWorldMap: Renders an interactive 3D globe using React Three Fiber with a world-map texture, atmospheric glow, starfield background, and slow auto-rotation with user orbit controls.
frontend/src/components/DeleteIPRecordCo: Modal dialog that asks the user to confirm deletion of an IP database record, showing the IP address and owner, with loading state during deletion.
frontend/src/components/EditIPRecordModa: Modal form for editing an existing IP record's fields (owner, country, city, date, status), persisting changes to the backend via a mutation hook or locally for mock records.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer with brand info, navigation links, feature list, legal links, copyright year, and a caffeine.ai attribution link.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky top navigation header with logo, desktop/mobile nav links, active-route highlighting, and Internet Identity login/logout functionality.
frontend/src/components/IPCard.tsx: Card component that displays a single IP record's title, category badge, description, jurisdiction, registration date, and truncated SHA-256 hash.
frontend/src/components/IPDetailModal.ts: A modal dialog component that displays detailed information about an IP record, including metadata fields like registration date, jurisdiction, category, and copyable hashes, with an on-chain confirmation banner.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Root layout component that wraps all pages with a Header, Footer, and ProfileSetupModal, rendering child routes via TanStack Router's Outlet.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A blocking modal form shown to authenticated users who have no profile, allowing them to enter a display name, organisation, and email to create their profile on the blockchain.
frontend/src/components/RegistrationSucc: A confirmation modal displayed after a successful IP registration, showing the registered title, on-chain IP ID with copy functionality, and next-step guidance.
frontend/src/components/TokenStats.tsx: A stub component that renders nothing, kept to prevent import breakage after the token stats feature was removed.
frontend/src/data/mockIPDatabase.ts: A static array of mock IP address records with owner, country, city, registration date, and status fields used for development or testing purposes.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using TanStack Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook that manage DFINITY AuthClient lifecycle, exposing login, logout, identity, and login status to the component tree.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching and mutating backend data including user profiles, IP records (search, filter, register, delete), and IP database records.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind CSS, defines dark-mode CSS custom properties (colors, radius), and adds prose/utility styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers.
frontend/src/pages/CoinDashboard.tsx: Placeholder page component that renders nothing (returns null).
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Landing page with a hero section, feature highlights, and CTA panels linking to IP registration and database search.
frontend/src/pages/IPDatabase.tsx: Tabbed page displaying an IP address database and an IP registry, with search, category/jurisdiction filtering, sorting, and CRUD modals for authenticated users.
frontend/src/pages/RegisterIP.tsx: Form page for registering intellectual property with title, description, category, jurisdiction, and optional file upload (SHA-256 hashed), gated behind Internet Identity authentication.
frontend/src/pages/Whitepaper.tsx: Renders a multi-section whitepaper page for the IPGT platform, covering abstract, introduction, problem statement, and more, with a sidebar navigation and print functionality.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for extracting URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, persisting them to sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL bar.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom color palettes (gold, black), fonts, border radii, box shadows, and accordion animations, with the typography and animate plugins enabled.
project_state.json: Tracks the current project state including architecture notes, known issues, and a list of implemented features for an IP intelligence/lookup tool with a Motoko backend canister.
